1.description: get Drammen kommunenummer and municipality envelope WKT

2.description: get buildings in the municipality (by kommunenummer)

3.description: get 200-year flood polygons intersecting municipality envelope

4.description: get quick-clay polygons intersecting municipality envelope

5.description: find buildings that intersect 200-year flood polygons

6.description: collapse building-flood matches to one row per building (count) by bygningid

7.description: attach the match-count back to full building records

8.description: keep only buildings that intersect flood (count>0)

9.description: find nearest quick-clay polygon and distance for each flooded building

10.description: sort by distance ascending and limit to 10

args.sql:

args.sql:
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, ST_AsText(omrade) AS geom_wkt
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsText(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS envelope_wkt
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningsnummer, bygningid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsText(representasjonspunkt) AS geom_wkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, ST_AsText(omrade) AS geom_wkt
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200
AND ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'))

SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%';
